description_long: This is a long, slender sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is dark in color, likely made of metal, and appears to be double-edged. The hilt features a crossguard with subtle, angular extensions and a grip wrapped in a dark, possibly leather-like material with red accents. The pommel is rounded and robust, providing balance and a secure grip. Decorative metallic elements are visible at the junction of the blade and handle, adding a touch of elegance to the otherwise utilitarian design.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark blade, red-accented handle, and subtle metallic decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade and the detailed handle with red accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the crossguard and the rounded pommel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's grip texture and the back of the crossguard.
attribute_handle_design: straight grip, dark with red accents, likely leather-wrapped, rounded pommel
attribute_ornamentation: metallic decorative elements at guard and handle junction
